label: The Shuttered Chamber
description: The Shuttered Chamber is a compact upper-floor bedroom partitioned in limewashed plaster and framed by smoke-dark timber that matches the wary austerity of The Saltwax Lodging. A narrow slit window with deep brick reveals is secured by heavy shutters and an iron crossbar, admitting light in controlled bands while muting the ward’s night-glare. A rope-strung bedstead and a lidded trunk occupy most of the floor, their placement leaving a single straight path to the iron-hasped door. A small wall niche for lamp and papers stands beneath a painted hazard placard, preserving Varric Holdfast’s interdiction codes within private quarters.
